title: The R Graphics Ecosystem: A Hierarchy of Packages
description: A flowchart illustrating the main graphical packages in R, categorized by their level of abstraction and purpose, guiding users from foundational to specialized plotting.
relationships: Base Graphics and grid provide the foundational system
lattice and ggplot2 are high-level systems built on grid
Plotly provides interactive versions of ggplot2 and base plots
ggraph/igraph and leaflet are specialized for networks and maps
patchwork/cowplot are used for combining multiple plots
